records.accepted_text:
Genesis memory export requires guardian authorization.
Portable capsules preserve continuity without granting authority.
A diagram shows an append-only memory chain connected to a portable capsule.

The guardian approved the offline memory backup.
The active writer remains unchanged.

campaign.goal: Improve deterministic retrieval quality without weakening ACL
